rows.label: qev050107_MSG0001
rows.name:
Just as I thought... He's a very straightforward man,
this Gi Ziordo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0002
rows.name:
And that is exactly why we have walked the same path
together since we were children.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0003
rows.name:
To think I nearly threw it all away just because of
a single difference in opinion... What a foolish tale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0004
rows.name:
...You came to fight us on our master's orders,
didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0005
rows.name:
Right now, I feel like I wouldn't lose to any warrior...
So, what do you say? Ready to go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050107_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you are ready to go immediately.

rows.label: qev050107_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050107_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask for some time to prepare.

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0006
rows.name:
A wise decision. If you challenge us in your current,
half-baked state... you will die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0007
rows.name:
Take as much time as you need.
Return only when you are in perfect condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0008
rows.name: ...Gi Ziordo, are you ready to go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah! I've been waiting for this!
Hurry up and let me fight alongside you against this warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0010
rows.name:
I leave my back to you!
That is why I can swing my power with everything I have!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0011
rows.name: Leave it to me... That is my job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Alright, here we go...
We'll show you how we truly fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0013
rows.name: Let us duel!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0014
rows.name:
...I would like to say that, but it seems
the battlefield we chose already has a prior occupant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0015
rows.name:
I would ask that we wait for them to leave
so we can fight without reservations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050107_MSG0016
rows.name:
We have no desire to drag bystanders
into our battle.[ST:wait ]
